query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- Lesson 360081 - Biblical Foundations of Church Leadership
(360081, 'The New Testament uses what term for church elders?', 'multiple_choice', '["Presbuteros","Episkopos","Both A and B","Neither"]', 'Both A and B', 1),
(360081, 'According to 1 Timothy 3, elders must be what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Wealthy","Above reproach","Seminary educated","Ordained"]', 'Above reproach', 2),
(360081, 'The role of deacons according to Acts 6 was to do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Preach","Serve practical needs","Lead worship","Teach"]', 'Serve practical needs', 3),
(360081, 'Servant leadership is modeled after whose example?', 'multiple_choice', '["Moses","David","Jesus","Paul"]', 'Jesus', 4),
(360081, 'Hebrews 13:17 instructs believers to do what regarding leaders?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore them","Obey and submit to them","Challenge them","Replace them"]', 'Obey and submit to them', 5),
(360081, 'The plurality of elders in the New Testament suggests what?', 'multiple_choice', '["One pastor is best","Shared leadership and accountability","Democracy","Hierarchy"]', 'Shared leadership and accountability', 6),
(360081, 'Church leadership is described as what kind of role?', 'multiple_choice', '["A position of power","A stewardship and service","A career","A title"]', 'A stewardship and service', 7),
(360081, 'The qualifications for elders focus primarily on what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Education","Character and spiritual maturity","Experience","Age"]', 'Character and spiritual maturity', 8),
(360081, '1 Peter 5:2-3 warns leaders against what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Serving","Lording over the flock","Teaching","Praying"]', 'Lording over the flock', 9),
(360081, 'The goal of church leadership is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Building an organization","Equipping saints for ministry","Personal success","Large attendance"]', 'Equipping saints for ministry', 10),
(360081, 'Explain the difference between positional authority and servant leadership.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Positional authority relies on title and power; servant leadership influences through example, service, and character.', 11),

-- Lesson 360082 - Church Governance and Polity
(360082, 'The three main forms of church government are what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Episcopal, Presbyterian, Congregational","Catholic, Protestant, Orthodox","Large, Medium, Small","Traditional, Contemporary, Blended"]', 'Episcopal, Presbyterian, Congregational', 1),
(360082, 'Episcopal polity is characterized by what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Congregational voting","Rule by bishops","Elder boards","Democracy"]', 'Rule by bishops', 2),
(360082, 'Presbyterian polity emphasizes what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Papal authority","Rule by elders in councils","Congregational autonomy","Apostolic succession"]', 'Rule by elders in councils', 3),
(360082, 'Congregational polity gives authority to whom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Bishops","Elders only","The congregation","Denominational leaders"]', 'The congregation', 4),
(360082, 'Church bylaws serve what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Legal requirement only","Provide structure and clarity for governance","Limit ministry","Control members"]', 'Provide structure and clarity for governance', 5),
(360082, 'Effective church boards should do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Micromanage","Provide oversight and strategic direction","Rubber stamp decisions","Avoid conflict"]', 'Provide oversight and strategic direction', 6),
(360082, 'Church membership serves what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Exclusivity","Accountability and commitment","Fundraising","Tradition"]', 'Accountability and commitment', 7),
(360082, 'Decision-making in the church should be characterized by what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Speed","Prayer, wisdom, and unity","Majority rule only","Pastoral authority only"]', 'Prayer, wisdom, and unity', 8),
(360082, 'Church discipline according to Matthew 18 is for what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Punishment","Restoration and protection","Exclusion","Control"]', 'Restoration and protection', 9),
(360082, 'The autonomy of the local church means what?', 'multiple_choice', '["No accountability","Self-governance under Christ","Isolation","Independence from Scripture"]', 'Self-governance under Christ', 10),
(360082, 'Compare and contrast two forms of church polity.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Episcopal emphasizes hierarchical authority; Congregational emphasizes local church autonomy and member participation.', 11),

-- Lesson 360083 - Financial Management and Stewardship
(360083, 'Biblical stewardship is based on what principle?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ownership","God owns everything; we are managers","Prosperity","Poverty"]', 'God owns everything; we are managers', 1),
(360083, 'The tithe in the Old Testament was what percentage?', 'multiple_choice', '["5%","10%","15%","20%"]', '10%', 2),
(360083, '2 Corinthians 9:7 says God loves what kind of giver?', 'multiple_choice', '["Reluctant","Cheerful","Large","Regular"]', 'Cheerful', 3),
(360083, 'Church financial transparency is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is legally required","Builds trust and accountability","Shows success","Is traditional"]', 'Builds trust and accountability', 4),
(360083, 'A church budget should reflect what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Past spending","The church mission and priorities","Wishful thinking","Denominational requirements"]', 'The church mission and priorities', 5),
(360083, 'Internal controls in church finances exist to do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Slow things down","Prevent fraud and ensure accuracy","Create bureaucracy","Limit giving"]', 'Prevent fraud and ensure accuracy', 6),
(360083, 'Who should count the offering according to best practices?', 'multiple_choice', '["The pastor alone","At least two unrelated people","The treasurer alone","Anyone available"]', 'At least two unrelated people', 7),
(360083, 'Church financial reports should be shared with whom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Leadership only","The congregation regularly","No one","Donors only"]', 'The congregation regularly', 8),
(360083, 'Designated funds must be used for what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Whatever is needed","The designated purpose only","General expenses","Staff salaries"]', 'The designated purpose only', 9),
(360083, 'An annual audit or financial review serves what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Finding fraud","Ensuring accuracy and accountability","Legal requirement","Unnecessary"]', 'Ensuring accuracy and accountability', 10),
(360083, 'Explain the importance of financial integrity in church ministry.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Financial integrity honors God, builds trust, protects the church witness, and ensures resources fulfill the mission.', 11),

-- Lesson 360084 - Staff Management and Development
(360084, 'The senior pastor primary role in staff leadership is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Doing all ministry","Equipping and developing staff","Micromanaging","Delegating everything"]', 'Equipping and developing staff', 1),
(360084, 'Clear job descriptions are important because they what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Limit flexibility","Provide clarity and accountability","Are legally required","Create hierarchy"]', 'Provide clarity and accountability', 2),
(360084, 'Staff meetings should primarily accomplish what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Fill time","Communication, coordination, and development","Complaints","Announcements only"]', 'Communication, coordination, and development', 3),
(360084, 'Performance reviews for church staff should be what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoided","Regular, constructive, and growth-oriented","Annual only","Punitive"]', 'Regular, constructive, and growth-oriented', 4),
(360084, 'Conflict among staff should be handled how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignored","Addressed directly with grace and truth","Publicly","By firing someone"]', 'Addressed directly with grace and truth', 5),
(360084, 'Staff development and training is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Costs money","Increases effectiveness and retention","Is optional","Shows favoritism"]', 'Increases effectiveness and retention', 6),
(360084, 'The relationship between staff and volunteers should be what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Hierarchical","Collaborative and respectful","Distant","Competitive"]', 'Collaborative and respectful', 7),
(360084, 'When terminating a staff member, the church should do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Act quickly without process","Follow proper procedures with dignity","Avoid documentation","Make it public"]', 'Follow proper procedures with dignity', 8),
(360084, 'Sabbaticals for pastors serve what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Vacation","Rest, renewal, and prevention of burnout","Reward","Unnecessary"]', 'Rest, renewal, and prevention of burnout', 9),
(360084, 'A healthy staff culture is characterized by what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Competition","Trust, communication, and shared mission","Hierarchy","Independence"]', 'Trust, communication, and shared mission', 10),
(360084, 'Describe the key elements of effective staff leadership.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Clear expectations, regular communication, development opportunities, appreciation, and addressing issues promptly with grace.', 11),

-- Lesson 360085 - Strategic Planning and Vision Casting
(360085, 'Vision in church leadership refers to what?', 'multiple_choice', '["A dream","A clear picture of the preferred future","A program","A building"]', 'A clear picture of the preferred future', 1),
(360085, 'A church mission statement should answer what question?', 'multiple_choice', '["How big are we?","Why do we exist?","What programs do we have?","Who is our pastor?"]', 'Why do we exist?', 2),
(360085, 'Strategic planning helps the church do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Predict the future","Align resources with mission and vision","Guarantee success","Avoid change"]', 'Align resources with mission and vision', 3),
(360085, 'SWOT analysis examines what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats","Staff, Worship, Outreach, Teaching","Size, Wealth, Organization, Tradition","None of the above"]', 'Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats', 4),
(360085, 'Goals should be what according to best practices?', 'multiple_choice', '["Vague","SMART - Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound","Impossible","Easy"]', 'SMART - Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound', 5),
(360085, 'Vision casting involves what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Announcing decisions","Communicating vision to inspire and align people","Demanding compliance","Writing documents"]', 'Communicating vision to inspire and align people', 6),
(360085, 'Change management in the church requires what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Speed","Communication, patience, and leadership","Ignoring resistance","Force"]', 'Communication, patience, and leadership', 7),
(360085, 'Evaluating ministry effectiveness is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is critical","Helps improve and steward resources well","Is unnecessary","Discourages people"]', 'Helps improve and steward resources well', 8),
(360085, 'The planning process should involve whom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pastor only","Key stakeholders and the congregation appropriately","Board only","No one"]', 'Key stakeholders and the congregation appropriately', 9),
(360085, 'Prayer role in strategic planning is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional","Central and foundational","A formality","Unnecessary"]', 'Central and foundational', 10),
(360085, 'Explain the relationship between vision, mission, and strategy in church leadership.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Vision is the preferred future, mission is why we exist, strategy is how we get there - all must align.', 11);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES

(360082, 'Compare and contrast two forms of church polity.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Episcopal emphasizes hierarchical authority; Congregational emphasizes local church autonomy and member participation.', 11),

-- Lesson 360083 - Financial Management and Stewardship
(360083, 'Biblical stewardship is based on what principle?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ownership","God owns everything; we are managers","Prosperity","Poverty"]', 'God owns everything; we are managers', 1),
(360083, 'The tithe in the Old Testament was what percentage?', 'multiple_choice', '["5%","10%","15%","20%"]', '10%', 2),

(360083, 'Church financial transparency is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is legally required","Builds trust and accountability","Shows success","Is traditional"]', 'Builds trust and accountability', 4),
(360083, 'A church budget should reflect what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Past spending","The church mission and priorities","Wishful thinking","Denominational requirements"]', 'The church mission and priorities', 5),
(360083, 'Internal controls in church finances exist to do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Slow things down","Prevent fraud and ensure accuracy","Create bureaucracy","Limit giving"]', 'Prevent fraud and ensure accuracy', 6),
(360083, 'Who should count the offering according to best practices?', 'multiple_choice', '["The pastor alone","At least two unrelated people","The treasurer alone","Anyone available"]', 'At least two unrelated people', 7),

(360083, 'Designated funds must be used for what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Whatever is needed","The designated purpose only","General expenses","Staff salaries"]', 'The designated purpose only', 9),
(360083, 'An annual audit or financial review serves what purpose?', 'multiple_choice', '["Finding fraud","Ensuring accuracy and accountability","Legal requirement","Unnecessary"]', 'Ensuring accuracy and accountability', 10),
(360083, 'Explain the importance of financial integrity in church ministry.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Financial integrity honors God, builds trust, protects the church witness, and ensures resources fulfill the mission.', 11),

-- Lesson 360084 - Staff Management and Development
(360084, 'The senior pastor primary role in staff leadership is what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Doing all ministry","Equipping and developing staff","Micromanaging","Delegating everything"]', 'Equipping and developing staff', 1),
(360084, 'Clear job descriptions are important because they what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Limit flexibility","Provide clarity and accountability","Are legally required","Create hierarchy"]', 'Provide clarity and accountability', 2),
(360084, 'Staff meetings should primarily accomplish what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Fill time","Communication, coordination, and development","Complaints","Announcements only"]', 'Communication, coordination, and development', 3),
(360084, 'Performance reviews for church staff should be what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoided","Regular, constructive, and growth-oriented","Annual only","Punitive"]', 'Regular, constructive, and growth-oriented', 4),
(360084, 'Conflict among staff should be handled how?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignored","Addressed directly with grace and truth","Publicly","By firing someone"]', 'Addressed directly with grace and truth', 5),
(360084, 'Staff development and training is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Costs money","Increases effectiveness and retention","Is optional","Shows favoritism"]', 'Increases effectiveness and retention', 6),

(360084, 'Describe the key elements of effective staff leadership.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Clear expectations, regular communication, development opportunities, appreciation, and addressing issues promptly with grace.', 11),

-- Lesson 360085 - Strategic Planning and Vision Casting
(360085, 'Vision in church leadership refers to what?', 'multiple_choice', '["A dream","A clear picture of the preferred future","A program","A building"]', 'A clear picture of the preferred future', 1),
(360085, 'A church mission statement should answer what question?', 'multiple_choice', '["How big are we?","Why do we exist?","What programs do we have?","Who is our pastor?"]', 'Why do we exist?', 2),
(360085, 'Strategic planning helps the church do what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Predict the future","Align resources with mission and vision","Guarantee success","Avoid change"]', 'Align resources with mission and vision', 3),
(360085, 'SWOT analysis examines what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats","Staff, Worship, Outreach, Teaching","Size, Wealth, Organization, Tradition","None of the above"]', 'Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats', 4),

(360085, 'Vision casting involves what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Announcing decisions","Communicating vision to inspire and align people","Demanding compliance","Writing documents"]', 'Communicating vision to inspire and align people', 6),
(360085, 'Change management in the church requires what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Speed","Communication, patience, and leadership","Ignoring resistance","Force"]', 'Communication, patience, and leadership', 7),
(360085, 'Evaluating ministry effectiveness is important because it what?', 'multiple_choice', '["Is critical","Helps improve and steward resources well","Is unnecessary","Discourages people"]', 'Helps improve and steward resources well', 8),

(360085, 'Explain the relationship between vision, mission, and strategy in church leadership.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Vision is the preferred future, mission is why we exist, strategy is how we get there - all must align.', 11);
